claims.claimText: Pediatric Cardiac Surgery & Research Fellowships line indicates a research-fellowship track within the CT Surgery fellowship program.
claims.limitations: Quote is a nav label; eligibility/audience not described on this page.

claims.whyA1Missed: A1 grouped this with the other fellowship tracks but did not separately note the 'Research Fellowships' research component.

claims.claimText: Stanford Medicine global navigation references Professional Training including Postdoctoral scholars and Clinical research fellows — post-doctoral, not pre-residency.
claims.limitations: Appears in the global Stanford Medicine site chrome, not in CT Surgery department content; not source-specific.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Postdoctoral and clinical-research-fellow training programs are post-MD trainee tracks — Tier 2.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 did not surface global-nav training categories that mention postdoctoral and clinical-research fellows.

claims.claimText: Department lists Residency, Fellowship & Instructorship Graduates — alumni track for completed trainees including an 'Instructorship' pathway.
claims.limitations: Navigation phrase only; 'Instructorship' specifics not described.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Refers to residency/fellowship/instructorship trainee alumni — Tier 2.
